1. On Goals
Do the goals seem appropriate? Ask how much coding each goal will take.
Short and medium term goals seems fair, while stretch goals is a bit of a stretch which Yifan is already aware and mindful of. I am intrigued to see the PySym graph for the Two Phase Two Fluid problem he is working on.

2. Outline
Is the outline appropriate for a <10 minute talk? Where should they spend more time or less time? Ask how much math will go into the talk.
Yes, it is appropriate given the time limit. The current time budget is fair - 4 slides for background and introduction with 3 slides on results sounds fair. 

In one or two sentences give a suggestion on what you might like to see in one of the slides.
